hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,py_compile,re; m=re.search(r'\"file_path\"\s*:\s*\"([^\"]+\\.py)', sys.argv[1]); py_compile.compile(m.group(1), doraise=True) if m else None" "$TOOL_INPUT" 2>&1 || echo 'Python syntax error detected'

node -e "const m=JSON.stringify(process.argv[1]).match(/file_path.*?([^\\\"]+\.tsx?)/); if(m){const p=require('path').resolve(m[1]); require('child_process').execSync('npx tsc --noEmit --pretty '+p,{cwd:require('path').dirname(p).replace(/src.*/,''),stdio:'pipe'})}" "$TOOL_INPUT" 2>&1 || echo 'TypeScript error detected'
